name: 禍ツ祓イ
description: Let's exorcise the shrine maiden possessed by evil spirits through torture!

name: Faithfall
description: Faithfall is a fast-paced Boomer-Shooter where you play as Maria, a girl infected with demonic blood after a demon invasion in the city of Valdovia.

name: Don't Get Your Hopes Up
description: You're looking for a new apartment in Amsterdam. Your once-confident search is morphing into panic. Nothing is available. Anything will do. ANYTHING.

name: 恋与未歇之雨
description: 故事发生在一个“相信就是真实”的世界。失去了部分记忆的男主——阳，遇见了声称是他青梅竹马兼女友的少女——小雨。他们就此开启了一段寻回两人记忆的旅程，并在这途中还原了阳失忆的真相。

name: PIG
description: In a final bid to cheat death, you challenge The Alleyman to a high-stakes dice game where every roll could be your last.

name: First Steps in Learning about Pregnancy
description: Play as a pregnant woman experiencing daily life from early pregnancy to childbirth prep. Learn about local medical and support systems through interactive choices. Features 1-hour playtime and save/load. Great for those interested in healthcare, education, or social welfare

name: Frosten: Two Realms
description: Frosten: Two Realms — An immersive story about a young man named Ivan, who possesses the extraordinary ability to freeze objects. His life takes a dramatic turn when he finds himself in a mysterious world brimming with magic and peril.

name: イロハニホヘト
description: 時は大正時代―― 主人公は銀座のカフェーで女給として働いてた。 ある日、いつも通りの出勤をすると店長にとんでもないお願いをされる…… 『美男子を紹介してくれないか！』 突然のお願いに戸惑う主人公だったが、お店のためにと引き受けることに。 しかし、思い当たるような知り合いはいない。 そこで頭に浮かんだのは常連の６人……。 彼らの誰かにお願いできないか……と考えた主人公は、彼らに声掛けをしようとするのだが――

name: Song of Nanzhao
description: Song of Nanzhao is a music-driven puzzle adventure set in ancient China. As a voiceless court musician, use pentatonic melodies drawn from nature to solve puzzles, uncover hidden stories, and connect with villagers, seeking peace through the power of sound.

name: Deep Inside: Amore sola mi fa remirare
description: An old fashioned RPG Horror Game. Venture into the mansion, investigate the truth behind the fire. The deeper you delve into the mistery, the more choices you will have when everything will unravel.

name: There Exists
description: A narrative VR experience where you explore 1790s Australia through the eyes of an English servant and the Dharug people. Uncover hidden histories, navigate immersive environments, and witness a pivotal moment of first contact.

name: 春琉ト怪夜
description: An adventure game where you aim to escape a storied mansion with a mysterious girl named "Haru" who you meet there.

name: Night Patrol Rules
description: Virtual group - PLAVE doujin game, set against the backdrop of winter school ghost stories. Experience the Night Patrol Rules of the Seven Mysteries through the eyes of all five band members, uncovering the unsettling truth hidden behind the mystery through your investigation and choices.

name: Come out, cat
description: The hidden cat is waiting for your words.

name: The Heavens
description: Ascend to the Heavens and find out if you're pure enough to be reborn on the Earth.

name: 봄을 부르는 설녀 - 유나
description: I received a love confession from a doctor I met in a peaceful countryside village I came down to find peace in.

name: メルクストーリア - 癒術士と心の旋律 -
description: This software allows you to enjoy heartwarming and joyful stories and still illustrations set in the world of "Mehterhane," which features 18 unique countries such as the Land of Sweets, the Land of Fairies, and the Land of Minorities. It is presented as an adventure game and illustration gallery.

name: 就労！！わんわんヒューマン
description: Work! Wan Wan Human is an [ADV Novel Game of Human Gachi-Inukenka] that educates sinners and turns them into adorable dogs. Become a correctional officer in a city of chaos where humans, demons, and angels are all mixed together and get the job done.

name: Kota`s New Journey
description: An elven sorceress decides to visit her old friend, but gets caught up in a series of exciting (and slightly lewd) adventures, where she finds new friends, rare spells... and loses her swimsuit.

name: Death Becomes You: Yuri Onsen Vacation
description: Alice and Sophie finally have the time to go on an onsen retreat. However, their trip gets inturrupted by mysterious magic. The last straw: "MY FOOD!!!" Will the couple be able to find the culprit and finally enjoy their vacation?

name: Cats of the Song Dynasty
description: Search for adorable cats in the fantastical world imagined by a painter from the Southern Song Dynasty over 800 years ago!

name: It Paints Me
description: Take the role of a painter struggling to finish his masterpiece in this short Gothic horror visual novel about art, pain and love.

name: Atlas Ablaze
description: When 16 year old Andi falls for the last person her parents would approve of, she seems to have trouble processing the severity of her girlfriend's situation. Cute visuals and crude humor helps to mask dark topics in the way that puts you in the headspace of a teenage girl trying to shut it all out.

name: BlightFog
description: Journey across a dying world. Manage your resources. Build relationships with anthropomorphic characters. Find a new home or become a fuel drinking madman.

name: Mangoo
description: Casual mini games.

name: The Painting
description: A short, emotional visual novel following a grieving man who relives memories of days long gone. An exploration of loss presented honestly and kinetically.

name: Chior Chapter 1: Hall Of Pillars
description: You had a pretty rough fall. Trying to regain your composure you try to look around before realizing you can't see anything. Hope that your other senses will serve you better.

name: obi3011-prologue
description: This is a cyberpunk-themed pixelated psychological horror, romance, and adventure game. Amidst a chance encounter in the rain and a forced gathering, an unexpected journey unfolds—a humorous romance and adventure story between you, a robot, and your furry companions.

name: PLEASE SAY HI
description: a short but incredibly touching experience.

name: The Icarus Experiment
description: Plumb the depths of a doomed leviathan on a mission to save a dying solar system. Unravel a mystery that could alter the fate of humanity. Created with Adventure Forge, this showcases the power of the no-code tool that lets you craft your own narrative-rich experiences.

name: Dairy of the Dead
description: Embark on a cozy post-apocalyptic adventure! Join Alex and his snarky feline companion, Missus Whiskus, as they navigate the bizarre landscape of zombified suburbia in search of the ultimate treasure: MILK! Solve puzzles, engage in witty banter, and keep Whiskus happy in this comedy puzzle game.

name: The Crimson Call
description: Set in a post-apocalyptic dystopian future, two young men set out on a journey to find The Great Appearance which manifests itself inside mankind's mind.

name: Kimi to Kanojo no LILYVAGANZA
description: This is a Yandere Yuri horror game where character sprites and still images move smoothly, created using Live2D and TyranoScript. If you enjoy Yandere Yuri horror filled with obsessive love, we highly recommend giving it a try.

name: Hydrangea
description: A yandere psychological horror visual novel. Choose a sweetheart to romance, but beware the petals of obsession.

name: Text Your Life
description: Who did you kiss that night? Text Your Life is a mobile phone chat simulator that lets you put yourself in the shoes of our protagonist, a female university student with a group of eccentric friends and a love life that has suddenly turned somewhat... complicated.

name: I SUPPOSE
description: A story of a simple walk home, with a sprinkling of intrusive thoughts. Make a few choices, decide what's best, and please, try not to overthink.

name: My Dear Delirium
description: Within this fully voice-acted Visual Novel, meet Elliot, and the vortex of conflicting truths he has become trapped in. Reach each ending to discover reality for yourself.

name: The Final Prize is Soup
description: You who are unqualified to drink Meng Po's soup, you have been chosen for the game of life. A horror yuri visual novel following a series of death games in the afterlife.

name: Morimens
description: Morimens is a roguelite card-building game inspired by the Cthulhu mythos, where you craft a versatile and intricate deck tailored to your playstyle. The choice is yours to embark on a climb up treacherous towers or engage in tactical battles. Explore misty maps and uncover the truth of the world.

name: Big City Dreaming
description: An open world visual novel filled with lots of intrigue and stories.

name: In Your World (I Own)
description: After a productive session, Yaldız and Gece find themselves in unexpected places and situations. Can you join forces with Inanna to defeat Utu, the god tormenting this duo?

name: Invasion of the Mushroom Men of Planet Y!
description: This is a quick, goofy game that lasts about ten minutes per play through-unless you choose wrongly-organ music, please! In addition to your choices, there is also the random element of chance that may affect your fate. Due to the constraints of the game engine, can only be viewed in windows mode.

name: Beneath The Cherry Blossom Tree
description: Dive into what lies below in “Beneath the Cherry Blossom Tree” an immersive visual novel where every choice carves a path through a tapestry of mystery, romance, and intrigue. Unravel a story that intertwines destiny, personality, and local folklore

name: Weeping Amber Prologue
description: Among the willow branches, a city of mushrooms passes another quiet night. Something is ending, something else beginning.

name: The Way Down
description: Absurdist Interactive fiction. Talk to the beings that inhabitant the world at its end. We forgot how to die.

name: HeartWare
description: Yours decisions matters, leading to multiple unique endings that reflect your influence on Iris’s fate.

name: One More Night
description: One More Night is an Elite, Anime Waifus-Realistic,. With Beautiful visuals, features Souls-style combat mixed with Hack & Slash, Created by a Single Developer, Enjoy this wonderful SandBox Open World.

name: Memoirs of an Angel (2010)
description: A fantasy-themed otome visual novel with stat-building and mini-games.

name: Undying Symphony
description: «Undying Symphony» tells a story about challenges that Leningrad people faced during the Siege and shows us one of the most tragic episodes of Leningrad history

name: Haunted Record
description: A 20 minute story about a mysterious ghost and an even more mysterious journalist.

name: Carpe Noctem - Yuri Visual Novel
description: A yuri visual novel about a vampiress and a monster hunter falling in love in Victorian England.

name: Pierrot à la Mode
description: A retro-styled narrative about a a new employee at a clown-themed ice-cream parlor.

name: Coin
description: Coin is a clicker game where you have to click cryptocoins! Every 3 and 18 hours you get a unique coin! The game have over 75 unique coins!

name: POOP
description: POOP is a funny clicker game. Earn new poops by playing this game and display them on your profile to become the POOPKING!. You can get unique new POOPs by clicking on the POOPs. Get a random POOP every 3 and 12 hours and grow unique POOPs.

name: Illusion Carnival
description: A lost soul wanders through a whimsical, eerie pop-up book like amusement park. Dive into fun-filled stages, encounter unique characters, fend off spirit erosion, and uncover the park's hidden secrets. The enchanting yet dark Illusion Carnival begins now.

name: Peter's Journey
description: Embark on a journey of this text anime quest with RPG elements! Walk through beautiful locations, overcome challenges and make Peter’s dreams come true. Every step you take matters. And don’t forget to take the diary - you’ll need it!

name: serial experiments l-If-e
description: This is a derivative work of the 1990s anime game [Serial Experiments Lain]. It was created using RPG Maker MZ and based on the official guidelines "Lain Time to Live".The game is about exploring dungeons and reading the scenario. I think you can play through the entire content in about 2-3 hours.

name: 帝王拆迁办
description: 变成魂魂之后，连天命之外的重逢都是轻飘飘的。如果真心被妙语连珠粉饰，那就不要去听，不要开口。嘘——看到了吗？他走马灯投下来的光影。

name: 重生之我亲爱的妹妹复仇计划
description: 在前世被“妹妹们”毁掉一切的你，重生回到悲剧发生前。面对撒娇、腹黑、洗脑甚至怨念成魔的“妹妹大军”，你必须斗智斗勇，守护家庭，上演一场荒诞爆笑的兄妹逆转剧。

name: 我和妹妹的日常~
description: This is a daily story about "me" and "my" sister. "I" need to make different choices in order to reach the final outcome. "I" was right to do that, right?

name: 若津谷村の祟り
description: 因習村推理ADV

name: The Hole Town
description: To the town in the hole... a story about a place where I can't go.

name: Seraphim Slum
description: An eerie liminal game that explores just how far an angel can fall. Play as sapphic Lucifer and corrupt angels into falling... in love with you.

name: The Final Act
description: The Final Act is a mix of visual novel and puzzle game where you assist writer Rebecca Carter in overcoming her writer's block by crafting the perfect murder plot for her novel. Solve intricate puzzles, adjust crime scenes, and navigate immersive storytelling to uncover the perfect crime.

name: Who is the Defendant: Deliberately Rough
description: "Who is the Defendant" is a mystery genre visual novel. Players take on the role of a prosecutor, investigating a case involving "a game with rudimentary art published on STEAM."

name: Horatio: Connector 13
description: Akio's accidental encounter with "Horatio’s Life" leads to a mysterious journey intertwining his past with a parallel world. Unravel secrets, confront otherworldly threats, and uncover the truth in this atmospheric adventure.

name: Harrowed World: What's Past Is Portents
description: Step into the dark and unforgiving world of vampires and have the course of your life changed forever. Experience a Rich Narrative Experience with gothic horror, distinct protagonists, interesting characters, and varied locations.

name: LIO
description: Unravel the story of a boy who wakes up in a mysterious world without any memories.

name: For Whom the Stars Shine
description: "Some stories are best told to none," she whispered. Long ago, the stars disappeared. Then, a man returned them. Few would believe such a thing; fewer still can recall how he bent heaven's ear. However, you won't find the tale in books or archives—only in the hearts of those who were there.

name: 海鳥野ガクの精神鑑定録
description: 「彼は本当に精神疾患なのか？それとも……」 精神科医である道島（主人公）は、ある入院患者の担当を任される。母親を刺したというその少年は、 奇妙な幻聴の症状を抱えており……。貴方は神話生物の魔の手から逃れ、生き延びる事が出来るのか…！？

name: The Dearest Person
description: A visual novel about what it means to be human. A story about loneliness, self-identification, and the meaning of existence.

name: Manga RPG
description: An original story embedded with manga, comic books, video games, and pop culture! Discover manga RGP adventure through the visual novel format with plenty of humor and hilarious references. Enjoy hundreds of original illustrations, accessible to all players for free.
